items.title: Procter & Gamble announces new CEO as it aims to unlock next era of growth
items.description: P&G makes a big change in the C-suite.

items.title: Procter & Gamble Names Jejurikar as CEO
items.description: P&G Chief Operating Officer Shailesh Jejurikar will become the company’s next chief executive starting at the beginning of next year.

items.title: S&P 500 & Nasdaq Notch New All-Time Closing Highs
items.description: Markets lost a bit of steam mid-session this Monday, but a late surge into the close brought the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq indexes to new record closing highs.

items.title: Earnings live: Whirlpool, Tilray stocks tumble, with Spotify earnings on deck
items.description: Second quarter earnings season is in full swing, and the results have been largely positive so far, with more positive surprises than negative ones.

items.title: P&G names new CEO starting in 2026
items.description: Procter & Gamble announed Monday its chief operating officer, Shailesh Jejurikar, 58, will become its next leader on Jan. 1.

items.title: Dogs of the Dow: Why Procter & Gamble (PG) is a Pillar of Dividend Stability
items.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is included among the 11 Dogs of the Dow Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) owns several leading consumer brands like Pampers and Tide— products that are considered essentials for many households. items.title: Tech Earnings, Tariff Deadline and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
items.description: Markets face a pivotal week as the S&P 500 navigates a perfect storm of Federal Reserve policy decisions, mega-cap technology earnings, and critical trade developments.
